_note: Copy this to <repo>/.claude/load-jira-task.json and replace the placeholder values. Only `jira.*` is required; everything else falls back to skill defaults (branch prefix derived from projectKey, preserved case, max 60 chars; sprints named Sprint_YYYY_WW; case-insensitive matching of 'In Progress' / 'In Arbeit' target statuses). Override only what deviates from those defaults.
